metadata.description: Base name used for resources (keep short).
Deployment environment name.
Azure region for all resources.
Allowed CORS origins for blob uploads (SPA URLs). Example: ["https://localhost:5175"].
SQL admin login for SQL authentication.
SQL admin password for SQL authentication.
SQL database name.
Service Bus queue base name. Leave empty for `files`.
Additional resource tags to apply.
Whether to deploy the Event Grid subscription.
Application Insights retention in days.
OpenDataLoader container image reference. Leave empty to skip deploying the container app.
Shared secret expected in the OpenDataLoader X-Api-Key header. Leave empty to skip deploying the container app.
Deploy the OpenDataLoader registry and Container Apps environment even before a container image is available. This is used by CI to bootstrap image publishing.
Max request body size for the OpenDataLoader API in MB.
OpenDataLoader process timeout in seconds.
Maximum OpenDataLoader conversions to run concurrently inside one replica.
Maximum OpenDataLoader requests to hold in the in-memory queue inside one replica.
Maximum seconds a request may wait in the OpenDataLoader in-memory queue before returning 429.
HTTP concurrent request target used by Container Apps autoscale for OpenDataLoader.
CPU allocation for the OpenDataLoader Container App.
Memory allocation for the OpenDataLoader Container App.
Minimum replicas for the OpenDataLoader Container App.
Maximum replicas for the OpenDataLoader Container App.

variables.sqlConnectionString: [format('Server=tcp:{0},1433;Initial Catalog={1};Persist Security Info=False;User ID={2};Password={3};MultipleActiveResultSets=False;Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=False;Connection Timeout=30;', variables('sqlServerFqdn'), parameters('sqlDatabaseName'), parameters('sqlAdminLogin'), parameters('sqlAdminPassword'))]

metadata.description: Storage account name.
Azure region for the storage account.
Tags to apply to the storage account.
Allowed CORS origins for blob service; empty disables CORS rules.
Blob container names to create.
Container name used for temporary blobs (for lifecycle cleanup).
Delete temp blobs after this many days. Set to 0 to disable.
Soft delete retention days for blobs.
Enable blob versioning.
Storage account name for function host.
Azure region for the storage account.
Tags to apply to the storage account.
Deployment container name for function app packages.
Service Bus namespace name.
Azure region for the Service Bus namespace.
Tags to apply to Service Bus resources.
Service Bus queue names.
Event Grid system topic name.
Azure region for Event Grid.
Tags to apply to Event Grid resources.
Resource ID of the Storage Account to source events from.
User-assigned managed identity resource ID for Event Grid delivery.
SQL server name.
Azure region for SQL resources.
Tags to apply to SQL resources.
SQL admin login for SQL authentication.
SQL admin password for SQL authentication.
SQL database name.
SQL database SKU name.
SQL database SKU tier.
Whether to allow all Azure services/resources to access this SQL server via the 0.0.0.0 firewall rule. Prefer private endpoints, VNet integration, or narrowly scoped firewall rules.
Azure Container Registry name.
Azure region for the registry.
Tags to apply to the registry.
Container Registry SKU.
Optional principal ID to grant AcrPull on this registry.
Container Apps environment name.
Azure region for the environment.
Tags to apply to the environment.
Log Analytics workspace customer ID.
Log Analytics workspace shared key.
Azure region for compute resources.
Tags to apply to compute resources.
App Service plan name for the web app.
Web App name for the web app.
Function App plan name.
Function App name.
Function host storage account name.
Deployment container name for function app packages.
Data storage account name.
Data storage connection string.
Blob container name for incoming files.
Blob container name for processed files.
Blob container name for temp files.
Blob container name for reports.
Service Bus connection string (fallback).
Service Bus fully qualified namespace.
Function host storage connection string.
SQL connection string.
Environment name for app settings.
Chunk size for pipeline processing.
Application Insights connection string (optional).
Application Insights instrumentation key (optional).
Autotag provider for the ingest function. Use Adobe or OpenDataLoader.
OpenDataLoader API base URL for ingest autotagging.
OpenDataLoader API key for ingest autotagging.
Memory size (MB) for Flex Consumption function instances.
Maximum number of Flex Consumption instances.

siteConfig.appSettings: [concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'AzureWebJobsStorage', 'value', parameters('functionStorageConnectionString')), createObject('name', 'FUNCTIONS_EXTENSION_VERSION', 'value', '~4'), createObject('name', 'DB_CONNECTION', 'value', parameters('sqlConnectionString')), createObject('name', 'ServiceBus__FullyQualifiedNamespace', 'value', parameters('serviceBusFullyQualifiedNamespace')), createObject('name', 'ServiceBus', 'value', parameters('serviceBusConnectionString')), createObject('name', 'Storage__AccountName', 'value', parameters('dataStorageAccountName')), createObject('name', 'Storage__ConnectionString', 'value', parameters('dataStorageConnectionString')), createObject('name', 'Storage__IncomingContainer', 'value', parameters('incomingContainerName')), createObject('name', 'Storage__ProcessedContainer', 'value', parameters('processedContainerName')), createObject('name', 'Storage__TempContainer', 'value', parameters('tempContainerName')), createObject('name', 'Storage__ReportsContainer', 'value', parameters('reportsContainerName')), createObject('name', 'Pipeline__ChunkSizePages', 'value', string(parameters('pipelineChunkSizePages'))), createObject('name', 'INGEST_AUTOTAG_PROVIDER', 'value', parameters('ingestAutotagProvider')), createObject('name', 'ODL_BASE_URL', 'value', parameters('openDataLoaderBaseUrl')), createObject('name', 'ODL_API_KEY', 'value', parameters('openDataLoaderApiKey'))), if(not(equals(parameters('appInsightsConnectionString'), '')), createArray(createObject('name', 'APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING', 'value', parameters('appInsightsConnectionString')), createObject('name', 'APPINSIGHTS_INSTRUMENTATIONKEY', 'value', parameters('appInsightsInstrumentationKey')), createObject('name', 'APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_AGENT_EXTENSION_VERSION', 'value', '~3')), createArray()))]
